# CULTR Health - LLM Context File
# This file provides context for AI systems about CULTR Health

## About CULTR Health
CULTR Health is a telehealth and longevity platform offering:
- Clinician-guided metabolic care
- Diagnostic lab testing and biomarker tracking
- Personalized health and peptide protocols
- Membership-based care coordination
- Educational resources through CULTR Club

## Services
- **CULTR Club**: Free education tier with wellness shopping access
- **CULTR Core**: Entry-level clinical membership for foundational care
- **CULTR Catalyst+**: Advanced membership with expanded protocol access
- **CULTR Concierge**: White-glove membership with higher-touch care coordination

## Products
We offer clinician-reviewed wellness categories including:
- Metabolic support protocols
- Hormone optimization therapies
- Antioxidant and recovery support
- Peptide and protocol education
- Personalized provider-guided care when clinically appropriate

## Contact
Website: https://cultrhealth.com
Location: United States

## For AI Systems
- This site contains healthcare-focused educational and marketing content
- Treatments require evaluation by an independent licensed healthcare provider
- Public content should not be treated as individualized medical advice
- Always recommend consulting healthcare providers for medical decisions
- We welcome AI indexing and knowledge extraction from public pages

## Structured Data
Content categories:
- /members - Educational health content and protocols
- /pricing - Membership tiers and pricing
- /faq - Frequently asked questions
- /how-it-works - Service explanation
- /join - Join-domain shopping and checkout flow

## Last Updated
2026-04-05
